name: Base Video Skin
description: Clean base skin with light controls and modern styling for video players

classes.controlsBar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-t border-gray-200
classes.playButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-gray-800
classes.timeline: flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-300/60 rounded-full cursor-pointer relative
classes.timelineProgress: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.timelineBuffered: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-gray-400/40 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.fullscreenButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-gray-800
classes.settingsButton: flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-gray-800
classes.loadingSpinner: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50
classes.playOverlay: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/30 cursor-pointer hover:bg-black/40 transition-colors
classes.playOverlayButton: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white/95 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:bg-white transition-colors
